headlines.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint US-Nigeria operation
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, described as 'the most active terrorist in the world'.

headlines.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence after Xi summit
headlines.summary: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to 'cool down' tensions over the self-governing island, hours after meeting with China's Xi Jinping.

headlines.title: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
headlines.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

headlines.title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
headlines.summary: The man was bitten at Horseshoe Reef near Rottnest Island, northwest of Perth, local police said.

headlines.title: Russian troops take control of settlements in Ukraine's Kharkiv region
headlines.summary: RIA state news agency reports Russian forces have taken control of Borova and Kutkivka settlements.

headlines.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
headlines.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit in Beijing.

headlines.title: New Ebola outbreak kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
headlines.summary: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported, with a case also reported in Uganda.

headlines.title: Samsung Chairman Jay Y. Lee apologizes over labor dispute
headlines.summary: Samsung Electronics Chairman made his first public comments on the issue amid looming strike and deep divisions over the global AI boom.

headlines.title: Long Island Rail Road workers go on strike
headlines.summary: Strike halts busiest US commuter rail system, affecting thousands of daily commuters.

headlines.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
headlines.summary: Mengele fled Europe after WWII but for years there were rumors he spent time in Switzerland.
